race.comment: SILENT FOX (3) showed good early speed from the inside draw last time and stalked the lead before going on to record a 0.8 lengths win over 1200m at Sunshine Coast. In fine form and worth following up. LADY ZAYDI (10) finished out of the money two starts back then was beaten 5.5 lengths when eighth in a 1400m contest at Rockhampton two-and-a-half weeks ago after being in the firing line on the corner. Best figures measure up nicely and is sure to run well. MEADOWBROOK (5) is drawn to get all the favours from the inside marble and can play a major role in the outcome. DOITLIKEMAXWELL (18) is usually thereabouts and looks one for the exotics players.
